name: BLUSKY AI INC.
business: BluSky AI Inc. is a pre-fabricated modular data center provider specializing in artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing (HPC). The company plans to offer GPU-as-a-Service and modular data center solutions on a subscription or leasing basis.

exposures.sentence: BluSky AI Inc. is a pre-fabricated modular data center provider specializing in artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing (HPC).
BluSky AI Inc. is a pre-fabricated modular data center provider specializing in artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing (HPC).
The global semiconductor supply chain remains volatile, with shortages, geopolitical restrictions, and high demand from cloud and AI companies impacting availability and pricing.
The growing demand for data centers, combined with aging energy infrastructure in some regions, poses a risk to BluSky AI’s ability to secure reliable power for its facilities.
Cybersecurity threats pose another significant risk, as data centers are prime targets for malicious attacks.

The focus on green power and renewable energy, while a competitive differentiator, also exposes the company to risks if renewable energy prices fluctuate or if new environmental regulations are enacted that affect operational costs.

catalysts.event: Entered into ground lease for 51.6 acres in Milford, Utah
catalysts.sentence: On July 11, 2025, the Company entered into a Ground Lease with an Option to Purchase (the Lease) with Wild Mustang Ventures LLC, a Wyoming limited liability company (the Landlord), through which the Company leased 51.6 acres in Milford, Utah (the Milford Land) for a two-year term.

catalysts.event: Settlement agreement with Mother Lode Mining resolving disputes
catalysts.sentence: On February 4, 2026, the Company and Mother Lode Mining entered into a settlement agreement resolving all disputes in connection with the LOI and the Clavo Rico mine.

tamClaims.claim: AI compute market predicted to be $1.81 trillion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: The Company is focused on artificial intelligence compute infrastructure and participating in the dynamic and expanding AI industry predicted to be $1.81 trillion by 2030 by Grandview Research.

tamClaims.claim: 35.9% annual CAGR in data center market over next 7 years
tamClaims.sentence: Grandview Research estimates a 35.9% annual CAGR in this market over the next 7 years.
